Large hedge. Berries ripen in the late spring. Access: Public.

Lots of dewberries along the ditch, right outside of the entrance on Blake Manor. And plenty within the park as well. 
There are a handful of Chickasaw plum trees by the pool. 
Greenbriar is everywhere. Access: Public.
